## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [Code Style Guide](CODE_STYLE.md)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have documented all new public APIs with `///` doc comments

- [ ] New and existing UI tests pass locally
